title: Tri-County (Portland Metro) Utility Assistance - 211info
text: Thanks to support from Portland General Electric, this page shows which utility assistance programs are currently open in the tri-county area (Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington counties). How to use this page: Choose your county below to see the most up-to-date program information. Programs shown in dark blue mean help may be available now, click to learn how to apply. Programs that are grayed-out are not available right now and can’t be clicked. Utility assistance availability changes quickly and often. Check back regularly for updates. If you have questions or want help, call 211.
